---
title: "Epiweek 27, 2026"
date: 2026-07-05
categories: [2026, Q3]
description: "Weekly IDSR summary: Category 1 & 2 notifications, confirmed trends, and epitable for 05 July – 11 July 2026."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Reporting period: **05 July – 11 July 2026** (CDC Epiweek 27, 2026)
:::

[View Report](../rendered/2026-W27-weekly-report.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[Download Word](../rendered/2026-W27-weekly-report.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="2026-W27-weekly-report.docx"}
